subject: refactor(hero): swap animations — pulse on icon, color glow on tagline
body:
Revert glasses SVG to original gray (#d4d4d4) and move the 3x pulse
animation from the tagline to the icon. Replace tagline animation with
a new text-glow keyframe that fades between muted and bright text color
3 times — more fitting for text than an opacity pulse.

Tags: styling, animation, hero
